title: The Healing Tears Matter
description: Pages 13–17 focus on the healing tears matter, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Bartolomeo, Robin, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as mansherry's healing power becomes crucial as Leo and the allies fight to save her from the palace.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: If it means protecting you, I will never falter!

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: We're on the in- side of an invincible barrier right now!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I'll start with a stab to your wind- pipe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: that should be enough to stop the wall as well...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: How un- fortunate, you poor, misguided fool.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: You were but a few centimeters off. What you stabbed was not my windpipe but my...

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: I've SUP- pressed Hakuba! I really am Cavendish now!

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: But I've given Hakuba control of half of my body!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Let go of me! I will kill!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: mean, we'll make use of Hakuba's speed to run straight to the sun- flower fields!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: It's our only choice! Release your hands!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: In that damn round shape of his...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: His neck and shoulder looked the same! Damn it!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: As long as I draw breath,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: Savor it, my friend. The moment your friends are blasted to bits.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Daimin it: How much of a fool could I be!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: Both of them...gone without a trace.

dialogue.speaker: Bartolomeo
dialogue.text: I guess barriers are pretty convenient after all.

dialogue.speaker: Cavendish
dialogue.text: Cavendish-kun stopped Hakuba's sword with his own hand... what an odd fellow...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: There's no way they could have outrun that explosion...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: I am not sure if this is

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: I've still got a ways to go, but in

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: I'll be the kind of man...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Uhahaha! It seems like quite the party down there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: with a battlefield as unstable as this, forget one foot...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: It's hard to keep your footing even with two feet!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: Run, Rebecca! You can't block it!

summary: The Healing Tears Matter advances the Dressrosa story through Bartolomeo, Robin, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
